kill -9 · nika run --resume
Finished work never runs twice.
the kill · mid-fanout exit 137
$ nika run signature-paced.nika.yaml --json > run.ndjson & $ sleep 2.5; kill -KILL $! $ wait $!; echo "exit=$?" exit=137 $ nika trace outputs run.ndjson task verb dur tok output discover invoke · nika:glob [3ms] — [5] · 101B digest exec · cat [7ms] — "- feat: nika test — golden testin…" · 324B stats invoke · nika:jq [3ms] — {files} · 11B draft infer · mock/echo [0ms] 64 "mock(echo) · Draft concise releas…" · 389B pace — — — translate — — — survivors — — — publish — — — 8 task(s) · 13ms · 64 tok · full value: nika trace peek run.ndjson <task>
the resume · from the trace ↷ 4 banked · rc=0
$ nika run signature-paced.nika.yaml --resume run.ndjson 🦋 nika · release-notes-i18n-paced · 8 tasks permits ✓ engine floor (no boundary declared) ↷ discover cache hit (resume) → [5] · 101B ↷ digest cache hit (resume) → "- feat: nika test — g…" · 324B ↷ stats cache hit (resume) → {files} · 11B ↷ draft cache hit (resume) → "mock(echo) · Draft co…" · 389B ✔ pace for_each · 4 items [6.0s] → [4] · 21B ✔ translate for_each · 4 items [ 1ms] → [4] · 1.8KB · 288 tok ✔ survivors invoke · nika:jq [11ms] → [4] · 1.8KB ✔ publish exec · printf [14ms] → "published: release no…" · 32B ── 8/8 done · $0.00 · elapsed 6.0s ───────────────────────────── pace ▕██████████████████████████████████▏ 6.0s translate ▕ █▏ 1ms survivors ▕ █▏ 11ms publish ▕ █▏ 14ms 0s ······································· 6.0s ╭─ nika ✓ release-notes-i18n-paced ────────────────────────╮ │ ◆ ⇉ ◆◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ … 8 tasks · 7 waves · 0 r… │ │ 6.0s · 288 tok · $0.00 │ │ outputs → receipt (string) │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ explore: nika run signature-paced.nika.yaml --json > run.ndjson · nika trace outputs run.ndjson resumed · 4 skipped (cache hit) · 4 ran live
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty · paced variant (nika:wait) so the kill lands mid-fanout nika.sh 🦋
